  "claims": [
    "AB 506 aims to increase transparency from online pet brokers regarding the original source of a pet.",
    "California has imported nearly 88,000 dogs since 2018, indicating a significant underground puppy trade.",
    "AB 506 prohibits nonrefundable deposits from sellers to protect consumers during the pet adoption process.",
    "Sellers are required to provide information about the origins of a dog or cat, enhancing consumer protection.",
    "California has been a leader in animal welfare by stopping puppy mills from selling through pet stores.",
